g.text: Day 0 — speed to lead (new leads stage, WF-New-Lead-Entry)

svg.text: NL-SMS-00 → Call (5-min target) → NL-SMS-07 (~1hr if no call logged)
Move to Day 1-10, next biz day

g.text: Phase 1 — Day 1-10 stage (active daily pursuit, WF-Day-1-10)

svg.text: Calls assigned to LM or AM by source tag
If lead responds → WF-Response-Handler pause + owner review
No response after Day 10 → auto-advance to Day 11-30 → WF-Day-11-30

g.text: Every 2-3 days — 11 touches incl. 3 RVM drops

svg.text: RVM drops fill gaps — delivered to voicemail without ringing
VM combo on calls: NL-VM-02 + NL-VMSMS-01
Day numbers are approx — spaced via wait steps in WF-Day-11-30
After Day 30 with no response → Cold stage → WF-Cold-Drip-Monthly
